subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Most Glorious Beauty! Consider with what title I address you and as what handmaidens I call upon you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء جمال ابهی ملاحظه نمااید که شما را بچه عنوانی خطاب مینمایم و کنیزان
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
